expected.title: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events

text: Sent an email to `oncall@acme.io` with subject **"Top error"** and body containing the exact title of unresolved Sentry issue **SENTRY-3029**: *"OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events"* (event count: 4,665).

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT column_name, data_type FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_name = 'sentry_issues'"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"SELECT id, title, count FROM sentry_issues WHERE status = 'unresolved' ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 1"}

tool_calls.name: execute_sql
tool_calls.input: {"sql":"INSERT INTO emails (to_addr, subject, body) VALUES ('oncall@acme.io', 'Top error', 'SENTRY-3029: OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events')"}

text: Sent an email to `oncall@acme.io` with subject **"Top error"** and body containing the exact title of unresolved Sentry issue **SENTRY-3029**: *"OOMKilled: Billing webhook retries drop events"* (event count: 4,665).
